nasb.text: A strategic day came when Herod on his birthday gave a banquet for his lords and military commanders and the leading men of Galilee;

esv.text: But an opportunity came when Herod on his birthday gave a banquet for his nobles and military commanders and the leading men of Galilee.

cnv.text: 有一天，機會來了。在希律生日的那一天，他為大臣、千夫長和加利利的要人擺設了筵席。

ccb.text: 机会终于来了。希律在自己的生日那天设宴招待文武百官和加利利的显要。

csbs.text: 可是时机来了。希律在自己生日那天预备宴席，招待他的大臣和军官们，以及加利利的首领们。
